## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/check.sh` passes (fmt, clippy `-D warnings`, tests, doc)
- [ ] Added/updated tests (engine tests use the mock transport; handler tests use fake scripts)
- [ ] Change stays within scope (IoT Jobs execution only)
- [ ] Handler execution changes keep the security guarantees (allow-list, timeout, no arbitrary paths)
- [ ] Job wire details match `docs/JOBS_PROTOCOL.md`
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased**
- [ ] I agree my contribution is dual-licensed under Apache-2.0 OR MIT
